is_segment.description: Whether the arc is a straight segment.
is_segment.title: Is Segment

is_point.description: Whether the arc degenerates to a point.
is_point.title: Is Point

is_ccw.description: Whether the arc direction is counter-clockwise.
is_ccw.title: Is Ccw

source.description: Source field associated with the diagnostic.

part_name.description: Part name associated with this footprint when known.
part_name.title: Part Name

role.description: Semantic role such as signal, dielectric, plane, or drill.
role.title: Role

material_id.description: Referenced semantic material id for the primary material.
material_id.title: Material Id

fill_material_id.description: Referenced semantic material id for the fill material.
fill_material_id.title: Fill Material Id

parser_version.description: Semantic parser version that produced this payload.
parser_version.title: Parser Version

source.description: Source path recorded by the source payload.
source.title: Source

source_step.description: Source step when the format has a step concept.
source_step.title: Source Step

source_parser_version.description: Parser version of the source payload.
source_parser_version.title: Source Parser Version

source_schema_version.description: JSON schema version of the source payload.
source_schema_version.title: Source Schema Version

role.description: Semantic role such as power, ground, signal, or unknown.
role.title: Role

name.description: Pad name, number, or source pad id.
name.title: Name

component_id.description: Owning component id when this is a placed pad.
component_id.title: Component Id

pin_id.description: Bound semantic pin id when known.
pin_id.title: Pin Id

padstack_definition.description: Padstack definition or pad template when known.
padstack_definition.title: Padstack Definition

mirror_x.description: Whether pad geometry mirrors across local X.
mirror_x.title: Mirror X

mirror_y.description: Whether pad geometry mirrors across local Y.
mirror_y.title: Mirror Y

x.description: X coordinate in semantic board units.
x.title: X

y.description: Y coordinate in semantic board units.
y.title: Y

kind.description: Semantic primitive kind such as trace, polygon, pad, via, or raw_feature.
kind.title: Kind

mirror_x.description: Whether primitive geometry mirrors across local X.
mirror_x.title: Mirror X

mirror_y.description: Whether primitive geometry mirrors across local Y.
mirror_y.title: Mirror Y

start.description: Start point or source start geometry.
start.title: Start

end.description: End point or source end geometry.
end.title: End

is_void.description: Whether polygon geometry is itself a void.
is_void.title: Is Void

name.description: Shape name or source label when known.
name.title: Name

kind.description: Semantic shape kind such as circle, rectangle, rounded_rectangle, or polygon.
kind.title: Kind

auroradb_type.description: AuroraDB geometry item name such as Circle or Rectangle.
auroradb_type.title: Auroradb Type

values.description: Geometry values in semantic board units, following AuroraDB geometry order.
values.title: Values

barrel_shape_id.description: Semantic shape id for the barrel or drill hole.
barrel_shape_id.title: Barrel Shape Id

layer_pads.description: Layer-specific pad, antipad, and thermal-pad shape references.
layer_pads.title: Layer Pads

layer_pad_source.description: How layer pad geometry was refined.
layer_pad_source.title: Layer Pad Source

layer_name.description: Layer name for this via-template pad entry.
layer_name.title: Layer Name

pad_shape_id.description: Semantic shape id for the regular pad.
pad_shape_id.title: Pad Shape Id

antipad_shape_id.description: Semantic shape id for the antipad.
antipad_shape_id.title: Antipad Shape Id

thermal_shape_id.description: Semantic shape id for the thermal pad.
thermal_shape_id.title: Thermal Shape Id

path.description: Path to the source field inside the format payload.
path.title: Path

description: Format-neutral semantic view derived from a format-specific payload.

units.description: Canonical coordinate units for semantic points.
units.title: Units

board_outline.description: Typed format-neutral board outline/profile geometry hints.

title: SemanticBoard
